hero.description: Explore a universe where matter and energy meet through art. Painting, tattoo, and performance under the concept of fluidity.
hero.tagline: THE DIGITAL TEMPLE: WHERE MATTER DILUTES AND ENERGY CONDENSES

brand.story: At The Digital Temple, we believe in the fluidity between the material and the immaterial. Each work is a channel for personified energy.
brand.craftsmanship: Discover the duality of matter and immateriality in every stroke.

pages.contactDescription: Have questions about my work or want to collaborate? Write to me.

errors.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the piece you are looking for doesn't exist.

content.p1: Alana is a full-spectrum artist. She channels, through her different facets, the conception of the world she sees under the concept of 'fluidity'.
content.p2: In painting, tattoo, writing, and performance, she shares her holistic-spiritual vision of things with the world.
content.p3: Her work is charged with esoteric self-referential messages, exploring matter and immateriality — personifying the energies she perceives.

pistache-intenso.name: Print: Fluidity I
pistache-intenso.longDescription: A piece exploring movement and vibrant energy.

chocolate-blanco-nuez.longDescription: Exploration of light and contrast in large format.

vinho-do-porto.longDescription: Local influence and mysticism in every stroke.
